text: A “traffic violator school owner” is any natural person, association, or corporation that owns a traffic violator school.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 626.8

A “traffic violator school owner” is any natural person, association, or corporation that owns a traffic violator school.

*(Added by Stats. 1985, Ch. 396, Sec. 5. Effective July 30, 1985.)*

subsections.text: A “traffic violator school owner” is any natural person, association, or corporation that owns a traffic violator school.
